title: Petface Foodie Faces Reuben Radish Plush Dog Toy with Crinkle Leaves and Built-In Squeaker (Pack of 1)
features: FUN PLAY: Keep your pet entertained with this plush dog toy featuring a built-in squeaker and crinkle leaves for added stimulation
PET TOY: Perfect for throw, fetch, exercise, play, training or simply snuggling up to
DURABLE: Designed to withstand playful activities while providing mental and physical enrichment
QUALITY MATERIALS: Made of high-quality materials that are safe for pets to enjoy daily playtime with

TOY SAFETY: This toy is strong but not indestructible, and will eventually become susceptible to ‘chew’ damage, please supervise your pet with this toy, examine regularly for wear, and replace if any damage could be seen a health hazard
description: Product Description Petface Foodie Faces Reuben Radish Plush Dog Toy with crinkle leaves and a built-in squeaker. Made from soft fleece with embroidered eyes and mouth, Great for playing fetch and encouraging exercise or could be your best friends new favourite snuggle buddy. Directions Pets should be supervised when playing with toys. This toy is strong but not indestructible and will eventually become susceptive to chew damage. Examine regularly for wear and replace if any damage could represent a health hazard.
